title: Testing Report
summary: Write a test plan and test report for your mini project.
studentInstructions: List at least 8 tests for your project.
Include normal cases, edge cases, and invalid input cases.
For each test, define expected behavior.
Record whether each test passed, failed, or was not implemented.
Write a short analysis of the most important failure or risk.

rubric.description: The report includes varied normal, edge, and invalid input tests.
Each test has a clear expected result.
The report clearly records pass/fail/not implemented status.
The student identifies a meaningful failure, risk, or limitation.
The report is readable and organized.

gradingInstructions: Use only this assignment specification and rubric.
Check required files before grading quality.
Write clear feedback and deeper notes.
